arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has just told Manchester United how to exploit Man City's biggest weakness
arts.sum: Manchester City took on Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park in the Premier League looking to take advantage of Liverpool's postponed fixture on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Onana HOWLER allows Gibbs-White to secure early second-half lead for Forest
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest get right back into the second-half as Andre Onana dives completely the wrong way to allow Gibbs-White to put Forest ahead with ease.

arts.ttl: 'What are you doing here?!' | Forest capitalise on ANOTHER Man Utd defensive error
arts.sum: Wood slips a header past Onana AND Martinez to extend Forest's lead over Manchester United at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Hojlund taps home leveller for Man Utd
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho gets in with the first attempt but is denied by goalkeeper Matz Sels before Rasmus Hojlund follows up on the rebound to get the equaliser for Manchester United.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United face Forest at Old Trafford
Man Utd v Nottm Forest team news: Yoro starts, Rashford a sub
arts.sum: Kick-off at Old Trafford is at 17:30 GMT The post Man Utd v Nottm Forest team news: Yoro starts, Rashford a sub appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd missed out on transfer for Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo rolled into one
arts.sum: Manchester United famously came close to snapping up Ronaldinho in 2003 but the Brazilian ended up joining Barcelona and became a club legend there, scoring 94 times and winning the Ballon d'Or in 2005

arts.ttl: 'He is ready' - Ruben Amorim makes Leny Yoro admission and explains Man United rotation policy
arts.sum: Summer signing Leny Yoro is in line to make his full debut for Man United against Nottingham Forest on Saturday teatime.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe admits Man Utd are MEDIOCRE as chief promises 'unpopular' decisions
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has given a frank interview on the state of Manchester United, while the billionaire co-owner has also responded to criticism after he decided to increase ticket prices

arts.ttl: Rico Lewis red card gives Man City derby headache for Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Lewis was sent off in Saturday's game against Crystal Palace
